title: P19 CEO CLV Unblock Decision Packet

executive_summary.p17_stale_artifact_explanation: P17-C (forward_coverage_readonly_check) was generated inside the git worktree .claude/worktrees/awesome-mclean-f52768, which did not have tsl_odds_history.jsonl. This caused pair_count=0 and tsl_odds_history_exists=false in the P17 artifact chain.
executive_summary.canonical_root_finding: Canonical root has data/tsl_odds_history.jsonl (7.06MB, 2747 records, 41 unique game dates 2026-03-13 to 2026-05-20). Raw data analysis yields 233 valid CLV pairs.
executive_summary.regenerated_artifact_result: P19-B regenerated artifact confirms valid_clv_pairs=233 >= pair_target=200. forward_coverage_status=CANONICAL_FORWARD_COVERAGE_SUFFICIENT.
executive_summary.closing_line_recheck_result: P19-C closing-line recheck confirms all 233 pairs have valid pregame+closing snapshots with odds. timestamp_parse_error_count=0.
executive_summary.current_block_remaining: CEO decision = DEFER_DECISION. This is the sole remaining block. Data is sufficient.

option_a.label: 批准 CLV_VALIDATION_ONLY
option_a.meaning: 允許執行 CLV 計算驗證。不 promote optimizer。不開啟 production proposal。資料唯讀。
option_a.unblocks: P19 CLV validation run (read-only, no promotion)

option_b.label: 維持 hold，繼續只讀監控
option_b.meaning: 維持 HOLD_NO_EXPANSION。worker 繼續 daily monitor only。不執行 CLV 計算。

option_c.label: 要求人工複核 233 pairs sample
option_c.meaning: 要求 worker 提供 sample pairs 的詳細資料供 CEO / CTO 審閱後再決定。

annotation: paper_only=true。P19-E CEO CLV Unblock Decision Packet。無網路呼叫。233 valid pairs 已確認（stale artifact 已修正）。資料層面 CLV gate PASS。CEO 決策為唯一剩餘 block。提供三個決策選項。不宣稱任何策略獲利能力。
